evidence_summary: The docs-only item-1 freeze artifact binds the required predecessor authority chain, preserves the accepted same-lane packet wins as bounded predecessor truth only, freezes live `P2`-`P6` and `N1` / `N2` / `N6` obligations plus out-of-scope `N3`-`N5`, and fixes the first mechanism-map deliverable plus fail-closed writable slice without widening the inherited current-architecture boundary.
